title: 3D M&E Drafting Engineer (Junior Level)
description:
Our client, a well-established engineering services company, is expanding its M&E drafting team to support upcoming projects. This role offers attractive remuneration, structured training for entry-level candidates, and opportunities to work on large-scale engineering projects.

Job Info:

  • Salary: Basic up to $4500 + AWS + VB

  • Working hours: Monday to Friday (office hours); alternate Saturday (half day)

  • Office located at Pioneer

  • Full training provided for entry-level candidates

Job Scope:

  • Prepare accurate technical drawings for Mechanical & Electrical (M&E) systems based on project requirements.

  • Ensure all drawings are updated, accurate, and compliant with company standards and regulations.

  • Coordinate closely with engineers, project managers, and contractors to align drawings with design intent.

  • Revise drawings according to feedback and site requirements.

  • Prepare and submit shop drawings, as-built drawings, and related documentation on schedule.

  • Provide technical support during construction and assist in resolving M&E drawing-related issues.

  • Offer practical input to ensure designs are buildable and site-ready.

  • Review drawings to ensure compliance with relevant codes, standards, and project specifications.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Electrical Engineering or a related field

  • Minimum 1–2 years of experience in 3D M&E drafting preferred

  • Entry-level candidates are welcome (Full training will be provided)

  • Proficient in AutoCAD and other drafting software

  • Strong understanding of M&E systems and construction processes

  • Autodesk Revit certification is an advantage

  • Willing to travel islandwide to different sites for survey purposes

Please submit your updated resume by using the  APPLY NOW BUTTON

By submitting your personal data and/or resume to us in connection with your job application, you will be deemed to have agreed and consented to us in collecting, using, retaining, and disclosing your personal data and/or resume to prospective employers for the purpose of the evaluating, processing and administration by company relating to this job application.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates would be notified
We wish you all the best in your career search.
You are welcome to visit our website at http://www.rkgroup.sg/
